name: specify-system
when_to_use: When you need to define the system requirements and implementation approach for a work item.
When the TUI should guide the user through a synchronous requirements-and-approach flow.

steps.description: Ask for the work item name and the minimum context needed to draft the requirements and approach.
steps.details: Collect just enough context to make the template specific without overloading the user with questions.
Use the generated file as the canonical place to capture system requirements and approach statements.

steps.description: Fill out the requirements and approach sections with concise, testable statements.
steps.details: Keep each statement concrete enough that it can be validated against the work item without interpretation.

steps.description: Validate the filled template and fix issues until it passes.
steps.details: The user should leave with a coherent system spec that captures requirements and approach in a form that can be validated immediately.
